estimates.formula: sum(w_i * y_i) / sum(w_i) over nonmissing y_i
sum(w_i * y_i) / sum(w_i) over nonmissing y_i
sum(w_i * y_i) / sum(w_i) over nonmissing y_i

generated_sql: SELECT "b"."TENURE" AS "tenure", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND (TRUE) THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e0_num_w", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND TRUE THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e0_den_w", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND (TRUE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_num_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_den_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND NOT ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_invalid_w_n", SUM(CASE WHEN FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_missing_y_n", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL)) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND (("b"."TOTHCPCT" >= 50)) THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e1_num_w", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL)) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND TRUE THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e1_den_w", SUM(CASE WHEN (("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL)) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND (("b"."TOTHCPCT" >= 50)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e1_num_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL)) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e1_den_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (("b"."TOTHCPCT" IS NOT NULL)) AND NOT ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e1_invalid_w_n", SUM(CASE WHEN FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e1_missing_y_n", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND ("b"."HINCP" IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) * CAST("b"."HINCP" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e2_num_w", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND ("b"."HINCP" IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e2_den_w", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND ("b"."HINCP" IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e2_num_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND ("b"."HINCP" IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e2_den_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND NOT ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e2_invalid_w_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND "b"."HINCP" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e2_missing_y_n" FROM "ahs_household" AS "b" WHERE ("b"."INTSTATUS" = 1) GROUP BY "b"."TENURE" ORDER BY "tenure" ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10001

formulas.denominator_formula: sum(w_i * D_i), reported for audit but not used in the count formula
formulas.missing_value_rule: Rows failing the numerator condition contribute zero; ineligible weights are excluded.
formulas.weight_rule: Only non-null positive weights are eligible.

formulas.missing_value_rule: Numerator is a subset of the denominator; ineligible weights are excluded.
formulas.weight_rule: Only non-null positive weights are eligible.

formulas.estimate_formula: sum(w_i * y_i) / sum(w_i) over nonmissing y_i
formulas.missing_value_rule: Rows with missing y_i or ineligible weights are excluded from both terms.
formulas.weight_rule: Only non-null positive weights are eligible.

metadata.weight_eligibility_rule: weight IS NOT NULL AND weight > 0
metadata.arithmetic_rule: DuckDB DECIMAL(18,6) component sums; final ratios rounded HALF_EVEN to 6 decimal places

variance.message: Descriptive weighted estimates only. Standard errors, confidence intervals, and significance tests are unavailable until replicate weights and an approved variance method are implemented.
